title: 4 Pcs Upholstery Staple Remover and Tack Lifter Tool Set, Nail Puller Remover Heavy Duty, Nail Staple Rivet Tack Puller Screwdriver Remover Lifter Puller Tools for Home Office - Rubber Handles
features: 【Superb Material】The upholstery staple remover and tack lifter set is made of high-quality 45# steel and rubber handle, which is strong, durable, surface is smooth, no scratches and they are not easy to break, can be used for a long time.

【Ergonomic Handle】The lever design reduces the required strength to save time and energy. With the big rubber handle design, it will not slip when removing tacks, and prevent your hand from being hurt.

【Easy to Use】These tools allow you to quickly and easily remove car door and upholstery clips without causing damage. You just insert the probe under the staple and use the rocker mechanism to remove it with little effort.

【Widely Used】The nail puller set can help to quickly remove deeply embedded staples in your furniture, upholstery, wood, floor, industrial, drywall, insulation bearing studs, etc. The nail puller set can easily slip under and lift or remove stubborn panel nails of different models and specifications without damage.

【Package Includes】A package includes 1 upholstery staple remover and 3 pcs tack lifter drapers, which is enough for your daily use. Ideal for upholstery, wooden pallets, carpets, furniture, picture frames, etc.
description: Product Description Ergonomic non-slip rubberized handle staple remover Ergonomic non-slip rubberized handle staple remover 1. Excellent material: The upholstery staple remover and tack lifter tool set is made of superb 45# steel and rubber handles, which is sturdy and durable, has a smooth surface, no scratches, and is not easy to break after long-term use. 2. Ergonomic handle: Lever design reduces the force required, saving time and energy. Designed with a large rubber handle, it will not slip when removing thumbtacks and prevent hand injuries. 3. Package includes: One pack contains 1 x upholstery nail puller and 3 pcs staple remover, enough for daily use. Great for upholstery, wood pallets, rugs, furniture, picture frames and more. Die Dicke ist moderat und die spitzen Köpfe auf beiden Seiten können Ihnen beim Bearbeiten des Holzes sehr helfen. 261 mm langer U-förmiger Polsternagelentferner Der U-förmige klammerentferner mit Ellbogen hilft Ihnen dabei, die Funktion eines Nagelentferners an geraden Stellen zu erreichen. 211 mm Länge, gerader Kopf, V-förmiger Heft klammerentferner 211 mm lang, V-förmig, eignet sich für kürzere Räume und spart viel Aufwand bei der Verwendung. 150 mm langer, spitzer Nagelentferner Geeignet für Innendekoration, Böden und andere Orte, kann Ihnen helfen, viel Zeit zu sparen.
